name: prompt-optimizer
description: Grading-first prompt designer and reviewer for rubric-based grading pipelines: rescues oversized grading monoliths into per-criterion call architectures, audits revised grading prompts, and authors pipelines from a rubric. Thin diagnostic trunk with composable branches. Also reviews generic prompts, with family mechanics for Gemini 3.x (Interactions API), Gemma 4, DeepSeek V4, and Claude.
